about_company: InnovateTech Solutions is a fast-growing SaaS company building next-generation enterprise collaboration tools. We serve Fortune 500 companies and process millions of transactions daily.
role_overview: We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join our core engineering team. You will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable web applications that serve millions of users.
responsibilities: Design and implement scalable microservices architecture
Build responsive and performant React-based frontend applications
Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
Participate in code reviews and mentor junior developers
Collaborate with product managers and designers
Optimize application performance and database queries
Implement CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices
Contribute to system design and architecture decisions

education.required: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

soft_skills: Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
